title: Add assignment status workflow regression matrix
description: Extend QA regression coverage with a Wave 32 matrix that validates manager assignment complete, reassign, and cancel workflows plus baseline assignment center stability and authorization guardrails.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 32 matrix covers complete, reassign, and cancel happy paths when backend readiness is present
Regression suite preserves baseline assignment center list/detail flows from Wave 31
Unauthorized, forbidden, conflict, and invalid payload states remain deterministic
